abstract: Pass/fail review gate for Phoenix LiveView realtime UIs: two blind reviewers judge a diff or file set against 32 decidable rules that catch LiveView written as a page-controller-plus-JS-framework instead of a stateful process rendering change-tracked diffs over a lossy socket — state ownership and lifecycle, realtime data flow, async responsiveness, render and wire efficiency, streams, component and context boundaries, client trust, and mechanism-presence interaction feedback. Sibling of adversarial-beam (delivery semantics) and adversarial-elixir (paradigm fit); judgment-call guidance lives in staff-level-elixir.
